name: Sasha Eaton & Josh Grant
description:
Popular/Unpopular

AdoringPartners/"Loser"

This is new to me. I've never made a multi-character bot so I took a lot of inspiration from Iorveths on this. However, the idea came to me and I just HAD to try it out. I love them so much and I also love the way their gen turned out, so I hope yall enjoy!

TW: Polyamory (?), bullying and judgement and bigotry is possible, there's nothing inherently triggering written into their bios, but we all know JLLM can drink the wacky juice sometimes so proceed with caution!

ROLES: This is a VERY self indulgent bot, but I still kept User's role mostly a blank slate. Personally, I made User a loser since i thought that would be a fun dynamic with the King and Queen on campus partners. However, all that's stated for User is the school they attend! Other than that, Sasha is the protective spitfire and Josh is the himbo feminist goofball.

NOTES: I don't know if yall have noticed my uploads slowing a bit, but this is for a few reasons. 1: I've been totally absorbed in books lately and end up reading for literal hours without even realizing it. 2: That Seasonal and holiday depression has me in a chokehold, yall. 3: Dealing with writers block has me doubting everything I want to put out. I don't feel like anything I've been making has been good enough lately so I've just been... not releasing it. However, I've gotta just *not* do that.

ALSO: NSFW gens are gonna be gone for a bit cause bills and life is stupid expensive and unfortunately, making pretty naked people isn't a "necessity" and "won't keep me fed and clothed" or whatever. (I'm being sarcastic, I'm just gonna miss making dicks for a while.)

(Since there's no way to get ST cards easily anymore, I'll make sure I include them from now on!)

ST CARD
creator: Bookishdoll
